Severity Guide:
CRITICAL - Dict iteration without lock, container writes → can CRASH (RuntimeError)
DANGER - Writes to shared vars, container reads → wrong results, stale data
WARNING - Primitive reads (bool/int) → usually OK unless correlated with other state
